creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Hi, thanks for your problem report.

The issue could be related to the java installed version. Try to run davmail with the last  OpenJDK available in ports (17), by tweaking the /usr/local/bin/davmail executable:


exec /usr/local/openjdk17/bin/java

instead of

exec /usr/local/bin/java

and let me know if works.

Also check with the combination of openjdk11 + openjfx14

Regards
